surface.description: Expose the skeleton. 95% monochrome. Color is function only. Use pure white or 10% grey with 1px stark borders. Zero shadows. Flat UI.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing combined with strict geometric grids. Dense tables for data tools.
layout_spacing.dashboard_tools: The 'Control Room' grid. gap-4, tight data alignment.

components.buttons: Square edges, high contrast. Primary buttons are #002FA7 with white text. Hover states explicitly invert or lighten.
components.calculator: Input fields must use monospace fonts. Results panel should be inverted (Black bg, White text) for dramatic contrast. Use Shadcn forms but strip any soft aesthetics.
components.tables: Price comparison tool MUST use dense, border-collapsed tables with hover-row highlighting. Keep it extremely scannable.
components.navigation: Solid white header, 1px bottom border. Clean links, no hamburger menu on desktop.

motion.hover: Instant or very fast (0.15s) color/bg swaps. No bouncy scaling.

icons_assets.style: Sharp, geometric, or duotone. Functional, not decorative.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Outfit (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), and JetBrains Mono (data/calculator). Do NOT use Inter.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use soft shadows, rounded corners (use rounded-none), or gradients.
For the Vendor Directory, use a Bento-style or strict Grid Border layout. Expose borders between cards.
The Peptide Reconstitution Calculator must have an inverted (dark) results panel with large monospace numbers (JetBrains Mono).
The Peptide Price Comparison tool must use a dense Shadcn Table, heavily optimized for scanning. Make the headers sortable.
CRITICAL: Ensure ALL interactive and key informational elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='calculator-submit-btn').
Admin dashboard should follow 'Control Room' grid: dense, utilitarian, strictly functional.
Do NOT use HTML inputs for advanced interactions; rely entirely on heavily customized Shadcn components with sharp edges.
